heading: Commodity Credit Corporation interest rate
label: 7283 Commodity Credit Corporation interest rate
notes: Amendments2002— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 107–171
amendments: Amendments2002— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 107–171

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the monthly Commodity Credit Corporation interest rate applicable to loans provided for agricultural commodities by the Corporation shall be 100 basis points greater than the rate determined under the applicable interest rate formula in effect on .October 1, 1995

children.heading: Sugar
children.label: b Sugar
children.text: For purposes of this section, raw cane sugar, refined beet sugar, and in-process sugar eligible for a loan under shall not be considered an agricultural commodity.section 7272 of this title
